issues.detail: Instructions contain undefined variables like clip_a, making them ambiguous.
Skill lacks error handling for missing files or invalid paths.
Skill is vendor-locked to Blender, not platform-agnostic.

scenarios.name: image-sequence-with-audio-fade-and-color-correction
scenarios.rationale: Response A satisfies every rubric item, while Response B uses ffmpeg and omits all Blender-specific requirements.

scenarios.name: cross-dissolve-speed-effect-render
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets every rubric requirement, while Response A is missing or incomplete.
